name: ping-island
description: A macOS menu bar (Vibe Island liked ) app that monitors AI coding sessions in a Dynamic Island-style surface — approve, respond, and jump back to the right window, all from the notch.         一款 macOS 菜单栏应用，以灵动岛风格集中监控多个 AI 编程助手的会话，支持审批、追问和窗口跳转
summaryZh: A macOS menu bar (Vibe Island liked ) app that monitors AI coding sessions in a Dynamic Island-style surface — approve, respond, and jump back to the right window, all from the notch.         一款 macOS 菜单栏应用，以灵动岛风格集中监控多个 AI 编程助手的会话，支持审批、追问和窗口跳转 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
